name: Bond County Community High School
description: Come play pickleball at Bond County Community High School in Greenville, IL! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: First Christian Church
description: First Christian Church is a place to play pickleball in Greenville, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Kingsbury Park District
description: Kingsbury Park District is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, IL. The courts are free.
